source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p><span class="TextRun SCXW142035299 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW142035299 BCX0">Resolve to Save Lives (RTSL)</span></span><span data-contrast="none"> is a global health organization that partners locally and globally to create and scale solutions to the world’s deadliest </span><span data-contrast="none">health threats. </span><span data-contrast="none">Millions of people die from preventable health threats. We collaborate to close the gap between proven, life-saving solutions and the people who need them. </span><span data-contrast="none">Since 2017, </span><span data-contrast="none">we’ve</span><span data-contrast="none"> worked with governments and other partners in more than 60 countries to save millions of lives. We work toward a future where people live</span> <span data-contrast="none">longer, healthier lives, communities flourish, and economies thrive. This is an ambitious vision, and it inspires us and our partners to make progress every day.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p></div><p>Resolve to Save Lives' Prevent Epidemics program works closely with Ministries of Health and national public health institutes in Africa to strengthen epidemic preparedness capacity, accelerate disease detection and response, and effectively use data to inform action. In addition to direct partnerships with governments, we also work with implementing partners, including the US CDC, the World Health Organization, the World Bank, and the Global Health Advocacy Incubator, to implement programs, prototype innovations, and ensure sustainability through increased national ownership, including domestic budget allocations.</p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Our Leadership,&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">G</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">overnance and&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">F</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">inancing team&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">(LGF)&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">h</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">elps&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">build</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;leadership and management capacities,&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">fostering</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;public health institution</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">al strengthening</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">.</span></span><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;</span></span><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">We also&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">support</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;countries improve access to and use of sustainable financing for multisectoral preparedness.</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Through leadership, systems thinking, and change management approaches, we help

notes: Global health organization with various non-tech roles
